chance.text: Bank says "Here's some extra cash!"
Oops! Caught going too fast on your scooter!
Race to GO! Zoom zoom!
Wrong turn! Go back 3 spaces. Oopsie!
Your piggy bank is overflowing!
Found $25 in your old jeans pocket!
Won the school talent show! Star power!
Your lemonade stand was a HUGE hit!
Pizza party for everyone! Worth every penny!
Dug up pirate treasure in the backyard!
Your cat video went VIRAL! Fame and fortune!
Garage sale champion! Sold all your old toys!
Spelling bee winner! B-R-I-L-L-I-A-N-T!
Baseball went through the neighbor's window...
Grandma's surprise birthday money arrived!
Your goldfish won "Best Pet" at the fair!
Ice cream truck! You HAVE to get some!
Found a four-leaf clover... and $100!
Your cookies sold out at the bake sale!
Video game tournament CHAMPION!

communityChest.text: Your savings account grew! Cha-ching!
Uh oh, time for a check-up at the doctor.
HAPPY BIRTHDAY TO YOU! Party time!
The bank made a mistake... in YOUR favor!
New school supplies needed!
Great-aunt Mildred left you her fortune!
Summer vacation fund is ready!
Helped the neighbor rake leaves! Good job!
Won "Best Smile" at picture day!
Tax refund time! Money back!
Your art project sold at the school auction!
Dog walking business is booming!
Mom found your report card... A+ means $$!
Oops! Forgot to return library books!
Anonymous donor sends you a gift!
Your team won the science fair!
Tooth fairy came... for ALL your baby teeth!
Recycling paid off! Save the planet AND get $!
Your handmade bracelet sold on Etsy!
Community hero award! You're awesome!
